Caption: Experimental setup employed for airborne acoustic treatment for (a) non-contact type, (b) contact type and (c) focus area, size and intensity distribution (dB).
Sound pressure (dB) measurement at a frequency range from 0 to 40 kHz for indirect and direct contact set up.
